prompt: Minimal flat icon illustration. A simple sun rising on the horizon with an empty stomach symbol — a simple belly/torso outline with rays indicating morning time. Or alternatively: a glass of water beside a rising sun, representing taking on empty stomach in the morning. Clean white background. Simple geometric shapes, bold outlines, warm amber brown color (#92400e). Icon design style, no text, no labels, flat 2D design. Centered composition with lots of white space.
negative_prompt: photography, realistic, 3D, shadows, complex gradients, text, labels, human face, complex background, clutter, colorful rainbow palette, dark background
